comment: sirsoft-admin_basic 78개 draggable 전수 capability. propControls(속성 탭, controls.json propValue 참조) + styleControls(스타일 탭) + events(동작) + nodeEditor(구조 에디터 슬롯, 단계 2/3). no-editable 0. 부록1 1:1 + 소스검증 정정(EmptyState/Breadcrumb 무이벤트, StatusBadge iconName=icon-picker).

props.className: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1
